content.problemStatement:
Chef had collected NNN notes of Rs. 200020002000 to pay his total college fees. However, the government banned Rs. 200020002000 notes.

Chef wants to pay the same amount using Rs. 500500500 notes only. Find the number of notes Chef needs.


Input Format
Each test case consists of a single integer NNN - the number of notes of Rs. 200020002000 that Chef has collected.



Output Format
Output a single integer - the number of Rs. 500500500 notes needed.

sampleTestCases.explanation:
Explanation:
444 notes of Rs. 200020002000 make a total of 4⋅2000=80004 \cdot 2000 = 80004⋅2000=8000 rupees. This is equivalent to 161616 notes of  Rs. 500500500.
